description_long: This chaise features a sleek, rectangular seat upholstered in a dark, likely velvet or fabric material, with subtle tufting visible along the top surface. The seat is supported by a minimalist, open-frame metal base with a distinctive X-shaped crossbar for added stability and visual interest. The legs are thin and straight, finished in a dark color that complements the upholstery. There are no visible armrests or backrest, giving the piece a modern, streamlined silhouette. The overall design is low-profile and functional, suitable for urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or public waiting areas. The surface appears soft and inviting, while the metal base ensures durability and support.
description: A modern, rectangular chaise with dark tufted upholstery and a minimalist metal X-frame base, lacking armrests or a backrest. Its low-profile, sleek design is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the tufted seat and the X-shaped metal base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the chaise's narrow profile, the thickness of the seat, and the straight, slender legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, again displaying the tufted seat and the X-frame base, with no backrest visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the slimness and the open space beneath the seat.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no visible backrest on this chaise; the seat is flat and open on all sides, emphasizing a minimalist, backless design.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of metal, forming an X-shaped crossbar beneath the seat for added stability and a modern aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color with a subtle tufted pattern along the seat, giving it a slightly textured appearance without any visible decorative patterns.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous cushion integrated into the seat, with no separate or loose cushions visible; the cushion is tufted and spans the entire seating area.
